Free tools

Calculators

Money Calculator→
Estimate channel earnings by niche and audience country.
Subscriber Money Calculator→
See what a subscriber count is worth.
Shorts Money Calculator→
Estimate Shorts earnings from the shared-pool RPM.

Research & analysis

Keyword Research→
Find what your audience is searching for.
Channel Stats Checker→
Live subscribers, views, and earnings for any channel.

Generators

Title Generator→
Headline ideas that earn the click.
Description Generator→
Write descriptions that rank and convert.
Tag Generator→
Generate ranked tags for any video topic.
Hashtag Generator→
Pull the right hashtags for reach and search.
Chapter Generator→
Auto-build timestamps and chapters.
Video Ideas Generator→
90+ proven content idea formats.
Channel Name Generator→
Name ideas for a brand-new channel.

Thumbnails

Thumbnail Tester→
A/B compare thumbnails before you upload.
Thumbnail Downloader→
Grab any video thumbnail in full resolution.
Thumbnail Resizer→
Resize to the exact YouTube spec and safe zones.
By niche

What YouTubers earn.

Real RPM ranges and per-million earnings for 14 niches, with a calculator on every page.

Finance & Investing
$18 – $40
RPM · up to $40,000 per 1M views
Tech & Reviews
$10 – $22
RPM · up to $22,000 per 1M views
Education & Science
$8 – $18
RPM · up to $18,000 per 1M views
News & Politics
$5 – $13
RPM · up to $13,000 per 1M views
Beauty & Makeup
$6 – $14
RPM · up to $14,000 per 1M views
Fitness & Health
$6 – $12
RPM · up to $12,000 per 1M views
Travel
$5 – $11
RPM · up to $11,000 per 1M views
Cooking & Food
$4 – $9
RPM · up to $9,000 per 1M views
Vlogs & Lifestyle
$4 – $9
RPM · up to $9,000 per 1M views
Sports
$3 – $7
RPM · up to $7,000 per 1M views
Gaming
$2 – $6
RPM · up to $6,000 per 1M views
Comedy
$2 – $5
RPM · up to $5,000 per 1M views
Entertainment
$2 – $5
RPM · up to $5,000 per 1M views
Music
$1.5 – $4
RPM · up to $4,000 per 1M views
Inside YTGrowth

AI features

Channel Audit→
A 10-dimension AI audit of your whole channel.
Competitor Analysis→
See what is working for the channels you compete with.
Outliers→
Find the videos overperforming in your niche.
SEO Studio→
Score titles and descriptions against top rankers.
Thumbnail IQ→
Score thumbnails on the things that drive clicks.
Keyword Research→
Keyword demand and competition for your niche.

Grow on YouTube with data, not guesswork.
